frontMatter.title: Things I Keep Forgetting - Behavior in PR from Forked Repository in Github
frontMatter.summary: Getting a Pull Request (PR) from a Forked Repository in Github can be quite confusing. Here I put a note to self about the behavior that apparantly I keep forgetting.

prev.title: Things I Keep Forgetting - ABI Jar is Classpath Snapshot in Kotlin
prev.summary: I repeteadly googling about the ABI Jar implementation in Gradle when in fact, Kotlin has the feature built-in with different name

next.title: Things I Keep Forgetting - Debugging Annotation Processor in Android Build
next.summary: There's an error in your Android build and it points to your annotation processing code. But, you can't debug it. Here's how to do it.
